$comment: Normatively defined in AIP spec §4.7.1. Overlay rules CO-1 through CO-6 are defined in §4.7.2. Effective capability computation is defined in §4.7.3. Submitted via POST /v1/capability-overlays. The signature covers the JCS-canonical (RFC 8785) JSON excluding the signature field. overlay_type MUST be 'restrict' — AIP v0.3 does not define expand overlays.
title: AIP Capability Overlay
description: A signed restriction document that narrows an agent's effective capability set for operations within a specific engagement or issuer context. Defined in AIP spec §4.7. Rule CO-1 (Attenuation Only): an overlay MUST NOT expand any constraint beyond what the base Capability Manifest permits. The effective capability set is always the intersection of the base manifest and all active overlays.

overlay_id.description: Unique identifier for this overlay. Format: 'co:' prefix followed by a UUID v4 in canonical lowercase hyphenated form.

aid.description: AID of the target agent whose capability set this overlay restricts. MUST be a registered AIP agent.

engagement_id.description: OPTIONAL. Engagement Object identifier this overlay is scoped to. When present, this overlay applies only to Credential Token validations where aip_engagement_id matches. When absent, the overlay applies across all engagement contexts for the (aid, issued_by) pair. Links to Engagement Object per AIP spec §4.8.

issued_by.description: DID of the overlay issuer. MUST use did:web or did:aip method. Overlays signed by did:key MUST be rejected with overlay_issuer_invalid (Rule CO-2, AIP spec §4.7.2).

overlay_type.description: Overlay operation type. MUST be 'restrict' in AIP v0.3. Expand overlays are not defined in this version.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this overlay was issued.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp after which this overlay is no longer active. MUST be strictly after issued_at. Expired overlays are treated as absent — the base Capability Manifest applies without restriction for that issuer/engagement context (Rule CO-4, AIP spec §4.7.2).

version.description: Positive integer monotonically increasing per (aid, engagement_id, issued_by) tuple. A new overlay for the same tuple MUST have a strictly higher version than the current active overlay. The Registry MUST reject downgrades with overlay_version_conflict (Rule CO-3, AIP spec §4.7.2).

constraints.description: The capability restrictions imposed by this overlay. Uses the same sub-schema as the Capability Manifest 'capabilities' object. For every field present, the value MUST be equal to or more restrictive than the base Capability Manifest (CO-1: boolean fields — false wins; numeric limits — min of base and overlay; path arrays — set intersection). The Registry MUST reject overlays that violate CO-1 with overlay_exceeds_manifest.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded EdDSA signature by the issued_by key over the JCS-canonical (RFC 8785) JSON of this overlay excluding the signature field.
